title: Loaded Cheese Dip
ingredients: 1 bag of Ranchitas Queso (cheese flavored chips)
1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese or melting cheese blend
Mexican crema or sour cream to taste
instructions: Step: Preheat the oven to 200 °C (400 °F). Arrange the Ranchitas Queso chips in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Step: Sprinkle the shredded cheese evenly over the chips.
Step: Add the crumbled bacon and distribute the jalapeño slices on top.
Step: Bake for 8 to 10 minutes until the cheese is completely melted and lightly golden.
Step: Remove from the oven and serve immediately, finishing with a drizzle of crema and chopped chives before bringing to the table.
description: A super creamy baked dip loaded with flavor using Ranchitas Queso chips, plenty of melted cheese, crispy bacon, and a spicy kick of jalapeño. Perfect for sharing.
